name: Dealfront B2B Go-to-Market Intelligence API
what_it_does: B2B go-to-market intelligence platform with REST API — combining website visitor identification (formerly Leadfeeder), company data enrichment (formerly Echobot), and sales intelligence to identify high-intent buyers, enrich company profiles with firmographic data, and deliver qualified leads to sales teams.
use_cases: Querying identified website visitor companies and their intent signals for SDR outreach
Pulling enriched company profiles (employees, revenue, technology stack) for prospecting
Integrating Dealfront intent data with Salesforce for account-level pipeline enrichment
Automating lead scoring based on website behavior and firmographic fit
Building target account lists filtered by industry, company size, and tech stack
not_for: Email marketing and campaign automation (use Klaviyo or HubSpot)
Contact-level individual identification from anonymous website traffic
best_when: A European B2B sales and marketing team wants combined website visitor identification with rich company data enrichment in a GDPR-compliant platform, especially for DACH (Germany, Austria, Switzerland) market where Echobot data is strongest.
avoid_when: You're primarily targeting US market (US coverage weaker than EU), need individual-level contact identification, or are a B2C business.

auth.notes: OAuth2 authorization code flow. Access tokens scoped to workspace. Webhook for new lead and visitor events. CRM integrations (Salesforce, HubSpot, Pipedrive) via native OAuth flows. JavaScript tracking snippet for visitor identification. Multiple OAuth scopes for different data access levels.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free tier with limited identified companies (former Leadfeeder free tier)
pricing.paid_tiers: Paid plans from $99/month; contact sales for enterprise
pricing.notes: Finnish-German company. Merger of Leadfeeder (Helsinki, 2012) and Echobot (Karlsruhe, 2012) in 2022 to form Dealfront. Raised combined $35M+. GDPR-native design from both companies. Echobot provides strongest B2B company data for DACH region. Leadfeeder provides visitor identification infrastructure. Combined platform unique in EU market.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per plan; contact for details

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for leads, visitor data, company enrichment, and intent signals. OAuth2 auth. Good documentation. JavaScript tracking required for visitor identification. Post-merger API consolidation still in progress — some Leadfeeder vs Echobot API endpoint differences. Webhook for real-time lead events.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Lead reads fully idempotent. Company profile reads idempotent. Visitor reads idempotent by date range.
known_agent_gotchas: Post-merger API consolidation — verify which API (Leadfeeder or Echobot) your use case requires
JavaScript tracking snippet required for visitor identification
Domain verification required for website tracking
Echobot company data strongest for DACH region — verify coverage for your target market
OAuth2 required — more complex than API key competitors

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR compliant. EU data residency. OAuth2 with scopes. Company-level identification avoids individual tracking PII. Finnish-German origin with strong EU data protection culture. JavaScript tag requires CSP review. Post-merger security posture consolidation in progress.
